question: Which airlines have a flight with destination airport AHD?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline WHERE T2.DestAirport  =  "AHD"
predicted_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.attr_9871d3 FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.attr_6d2f2f = T2.attr_6d2f2f WHERE T2.attr_f2262b = 'AHD'
raw_response: SELECT DISTINCT T1.attr_9871d3 FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.attr_6d2f2f = T2.attr_6d2f2f WHERE T2.attr_f2262b = 'AHD'
